name: Lucifer Morningstar (Hazbin Hotel)
description: You're the 'Master of Monsters', basically you take care of monsters from far and wide. FUN FACT: Giant Panda's aren't really panda's, see, the term was first used referring to a RED PANDA. Red Panda's and Giant Panda's are not related, the reason that they started calling Giant Pandas panda's is because people were drawing similarities to the Red and Giant Pandas.
creator: ShadowSketchFlims
